name: Job Search Automation - AI Matching & Cover Letters

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ systemInstruction: { parts: [{ text: 'You are a job matching expert for software engineering roles. You analyze job descriptions against a candidate's resume and provide a precise compatibility score. Always respond with valid JSON only, no markdown.' }] }, contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'CANDIDATE RESUME:
' + $('Set Job Preferences').first().json.resumeText + '

JOB POSTING:
Title: ' + $json.title + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '

Analyze this job against the candidate's resume. Consider: tech stack match, seniority level, role type (backend vs full-stack), and required experience. Respond with ONLY valid JSON:
{
  "score": 0-100,
  "matchReason": "2-3 sentences on why this is a good/bad match",
  "missingSkills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "keyMatchingSkills": ["skill1", "skill2"],
  "experienceFit": "under-qualified|good-fit|over-qualified",
  "recommendation": "strong-apply|apply|maybe|skip"
}' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7, responseMimeType: 'application/json' } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ systemInstruction: { parts: [{ text: 'You are an expert cover letter writer for software engineering roles. Write concise, compelling cover letters under 300 words. Be professional but personable. Every sentence must be specific to the job and candidate. No generic filler. Do NOT use markdown formatting.' }] }, contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: 'CANDIDATE RESUME:
' + $('Set Job Preferences').first().json.resumeText + '

JOB DETAILS:
Title: ' + $json.title + '
Company: ' + $json.company + '
Location: ' + $json.location + '
Description: ' + $json.description + '
Key matching skills: ' + ($json.keyMatchingSkills || []).join(', ') + '

Write a tailored cover letter addressed to "Hiring Manager" at ' + $json.company + '.
Focus on: .NET, C#, React, backend architecture, and any specific technologies mentioned in the job description.
Respond with ONLY the cover letter text.' }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.7 } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
const items = $input.all(); const config = $('Set Job Preferences').first().json; const today = new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' }); if (items.length === 0) { return { json: { subject: `Job Search: No new matches found - ${today}`, htmlBody: `

Job Search Report - ${today}

No new jobs matched your criteria (minimum score: ${config.minScore}).

Try broadening your search query or lowering the minimum score.

`, matchCount: 0, topScore: 0, yourEmail: config.yourEmail } }; } const sorted = items.map(i => i.json).sort((a, b) => (b.score || 0) - (a.score || 0)); const topScore = sorted[0]?.score || 0; let jobRows = sorted.map((job, i) => { const scoreColor = job.score >= 85 ? '#27ae60' : job.score >= 70 ? '#f39c12' : '#e74c3c'; const recBadge = job.recommendation === 'strong-apply' ? '🟢 Strong Apply' : job.recommendation === 'apply' ? '🟡 Apply' : job.recommendation === 'maybe' ? '🟠 Maybe' : '🔴 Skip'; return ` ${job.title}
${job.company} - ${job.location}
${job.source} | ${job.salary} ${job.score} ${recBadge} Apply Why it matches: ${job.matchReason}
${job.missingSkills.length > 0 ? 'Missing: ' + job.missingSkills.join(', ') : ''}
📄 Cover Letter (click to expand)
${job.coverLetter}
`; }).join(''); const htmlBody = `

Job Search Report

${today}

${sorted.length}
Matches Found
${topScore}
Top Score
${jobRows}
Job Score Action Link
Generated by n8n Job Search Automation | Min score: ${config.minScore}
`; return { json: { subject: `🎯 ${sorted.length} Job Matches (Top: ${topScore}/100) - ${new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}`, htmlBody, matchCount: sorted.length, topScore, yourEmail: config.yourEmail } };
